    1. getBindableType()
    2. getBindableJavaType()

Interface Bindable<T>

Type Parameters:
T - The type of the represented object or attribute
All Known Subinterfaces:
BooleanAttribute<X>, CollectionAttribute<X,E>, ComparableAttribute<X,C>, EntityType<X>, ListAttribute<X,E>, MapAttribute<X,K,V>, NumericAttribute<X,N>, PluralAttribute<X,C,E>, SetAttribute<X,E>, SingularAttribute<X,T>, TemporalAttribute<X,T>, TextAttribute<X>
public interface Bindable<T>
An instances of the type Bindable represents an object or attribute type that can be bound into a Path.
Since:
2.0

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    static enum 
    Bindable.BindableType
     

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Class<T>
    getBindableJavaType()
    Return the Java type of the represented object.
    Bindable.BindableType
    getBindableType()
    Return the bindable type of the represented object.

  • Method Details

    • getBindableType

      Bindable.BindableType getBindableType()
      Return the bindable type of the represented object.
      Returns:
      bindable type

    • getBindableJavaType

      Class<T> getBindableJavaType()
      Return the Java type of the represented object. If the bindable type of the object is PLURAL_ATTRIBUTE, the Java element type is returned. If the bindable type is SINGULAR_ATTRIBUTE or ENTITY_TYPE, the Java type of the represented entity or attribute is returned.
      Returns:
      Java type
